name: Decision Risk Register
description: Builds a lightweight risk register for a chosen or leading option with risk statements, likelihood, impact, warning indicators, mitigations, contingencies, owners, and review dates.
author: Bell (design)
target_user: Managers, founders, project leads, students, household decision-makers, and anyone who wants a lightweight risk register before acting.
trigger_keywords: what are the risks of this decision
help me make a risk register
what could go wrong if I do this
use_cases: Tracking warning indicators before and after commitment
Creating review checkpoints for a medium-stakes plan
